mapper.sql: id, user_id, type, title, content, biz_id, biz_type, read_flag, read_time, send_status, send_time, fail_reason, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_notify_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_notify_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = 0 AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_notify_record (id, user_id, type, title, content, biz_id, biz_type, read_flag, read_time, send_status, send_time, fail_reason, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{bizId}, #{bizType}, #{readFlag}, #{readTime}, #{sendStatus}, #{sendTime}, #{failReason}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_notify_record
read_flag = #{readFlag}, read_time = #{readTime}, send_status = #{sendStatus}, send_time = #{sendTime}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_notify_record SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_notify_record SET read_flag = 1, read_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_notify_record SET read_flag = 1, read_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = 0 AND deleted = 0
